component.description: CMOS, Low Voltage, 2-Wire Serially Controlled, Matrix Switches

absolute_maximum_ratings.conditions: to VDD + 0.3 V or 30 mA, whichever occurs first
Pulsed at 1 ms, 10% Duty Cycle max

pin_definitions.description: Serial Clock Line. Used in conjunction with the SDA line to clock data into the 8-bit input shift register.
Active low control input that clears the input register and turns all switches to the OFF condition (ADG728 only).
Serial Data Line. Bidirectional open-drain data line used to write and read back data.
Source Terminal. May be an input or output.
Source Terminal. May be an input or output.

Power Supply Input. 2.7 V to 5.5 V.
Address Input. Sets the second least significant bit of the 7-bit slave address.
Address Input. Sets the least significant bit of the 7-bit slave address.
